title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Flipkart Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Flipkart Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Global Group has an exciting opening for a SEO Specialist at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Flipkart Global Group:
Flipkart Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Global Group!
